**Infrastructure operations log (sprint day, 2026-07-19):**

15 services: user-profile-service, payment-gateway, billing-worker, auth-service, ingest-api, search-indexer, export-pipeline, notification-daemon, scheduler-core, webhook-relay, session-manager, cache-warmer, metrics-collector, audit-logger, report-builder across 6 environments (QA cluster, canary, production, staging, dev sandbox, blue/green pools).

Reference IDs: PM4GZRG3, SFDSZ8ET, MEZ8Q6EG, 8HGYK8N8, JYAFTVFN, CVBNHYGP, 24BRC24B, 4E3JUER7, W6S97JXS, 2Z6SNV6T, E9KAKZK2, 5V2QZSW6, F6CDAAKH, XMWVSSQ4, VHW5F9Q4, EWWD4GBS.

Operations: health-checks, scaling, patches, rollbacks, migrations, restarts, drains, reconfigs, upgrades, downgrades, inspections, redeployments.

Outcomes: error-rate stabilization, queue clearing, memory reduction, manual retries, early completion, alert clearing. Operations logged 09:15, 11:05, 14:40, 16:20, evening shift. Follow-up config-tidying tasks filed. No significant customer impact.
